## **Premium Blocks**

Level up your content with premium blocks built to make your site stand out

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/07/image-overlay.png)\\
\\
**Image Overlay** \\
\\
A beautiful way to create an image link with an overlay title and subtitle. Using the powerful options you can set placement, animations, and hover effects.\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/image-overlay/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/07/modal.png)\\
\\
**Modal** \\
\\
Easily create a call to action button that opens a modal box. Include any kind of content within your modal. Customize overlay, animation, size, placement ect.\\
\\
Learn more](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/modal-block/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/07/post-carousel.png)\\
\\
**Post Grid/Carousel** \\
\\
Add a grid or carousel of posts (pages or custom post type) and customize the styling to your desired look. Posts can be selected individually or by taxonomy.\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/post-grid-carousel-block/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/07/portfolio.png)\\
\\
**Portfolio Grid/Carousel** \\
\\
Add a grid or carousel of posts (pages or custom post type) with an **image-heavy design**. Posts can be selected individually or by taxonomy.\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/portfolio-grid-carousel-block/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/07/product-carousel.png)\\
\\
**Product Carousel** \\
\\
Add a Woocommerce product carousel to your page or post, select products by category, on sale, best selling, or individually.\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/product-carousel-block/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/07/split-content.png)\\
\\
**Split Content** \\
\\
Create a two-column row using an image or video in one column with adjustable width. Input any desirable blocks in the content column.\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/split-content/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/07/slider.png)\\
\\
**Advanced Slider** \\
\\
Create beautiful sliders right in the block editor. Any block can be placed in the slider, it’s the perfect lightweight replacement for a separate slider plugin.\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/advanced-slider/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/04/info_block.png)\\
\\
**User Info** \\
\\
Display information about the currently logged-in user. Show their gravatar, name, and registration date. \\
\\
More info coming soon](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/pro/#)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/07/video-popup.png)\\
\\
**Video Popup Addons** \\
\\
Beautifully display a thumbnail with overlay and hover effects that link to a video popup on click. Works with local or external videos!\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/video-popup-block/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/04/gallery_block.png)\\
\\
**Pro Gallery Addons** \\
\\
Get access to premium layouts like the thumbnail slider to make your galleries stand out!\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/pro-gallery-addons/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/04/countdown_block.png)\\
\\
**Pro Countdown Addons** \\
\\
Create evergreen countdowns that match users by IP address or cookie. The ultimate way to create a sense of urgency.\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/countdown-block/)

[![](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/wp-content/uploads/sites/8/2021/04/form_block.png)\\
\\
**Pro Form Addons** \\
\\
Automatically add your subscribers to Mailchimp or services, send an automated response and log each form submit.\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/form-block/)

## **Premium Features**

Next-level features to make your site beautifully effective

### PRO: Animate on Scroll

Create a beautiful experience for your visitors with on-scroll animation to reveal your content in an engaging way.

### PRO: Custom Icons

Never be without the perfect icon, with custom icons you can upload your own custom icon or an entire set.

### PRO: Dynamic Content

Dynamically pull in custom fields into your blocks for powerful site control. Really useful for hooked elements.

### PRO: Custom Fonts

Create the perfect design with the perfect font. Easily upload a custom font or use Adobe Fonts.

### PRO: Premium Design Library

Speed up your development with access to all of the premium design library items and starter sites.

### PRO: Page Specific Scripts

Need to add custom tracking script to a single page or post, now you can right in the editor tools.

web.description: The Testimonial block allows you to add a customizable testimonial section to your site. Add customer feedback and client praise to any block enabled area ...
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/testimonial-block/#main)

Select the Knowledge BaseAll ProductsKadence AIKadence BlocksKadence ConversionsKadence Creative KitKadence GeneralKadence GuidesKadence InsightsKadence Pattern HubKadence Shop KitKadence Theme

The Testimonial block allows you to add a customizable testimonial section to your site. Add customer feedback and client praise to any block enabled area of your site!

## Insert a Testimonial Block

To get started using the Testimonial block, first insert it using the block editor:

![Testimonial Block - Insert new block](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/testimonial-e1752528707299.png)

## Choose the Testimonial Layout and Style

![Testimonial Block - Layout styles.](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/testimonialblock.gif)

In the General tab you can choose between a **Grid** layout and a **Carousel** layout. You can also specify how many columns and adjust the spacing between each testimonial.

## Carousel Settings

After selecting the Carousel layout, a new settings section appears.

**Carousel Type:** Choose either _Infinite Loop_ or _Rewind_.

**Carousel Auto Play:** When enabled, the slider will automatically start on load. This also reveals the **Autoplay Speed** setting.

**Carousel Slide Transition Speed:** Controls the speed of the slider transition.

**Slides to Scroll:** Choose _One_ or _All_.

**Arrow Style:** Choose a navigation style or _None_ to disable.

**Dot Style:** Choose a dot style or _None_ to disable.

![Testimonial Block - Carousel Settings](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/Screenshot-2025-07-14-at-3.41.06%E2%80%AFPM.png)

## Style Settings

Configure your container settings:

![Testimonial Block - Style Settings](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/testimonial_container.png)

Scroll through the rest of the settings and make adjustments until you’re happy with the configuration of your testimonials.

**Icon Settings:** Enable to insert an icon above your testimonials.

**Title Settings:** Show the title and adjust HTML tag, font-size, etc.

**Rating Settings:** Show star ratings and customize color and icon size.

**Content Settings:** Show and style the testimonial content.

**Media Settings:** Show and style the testimonial image.

**Name & Occupation Settings:** Show and style the Name and Occupation fields.

![Testimonial Block - Style Settings](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/Screenshot-2025-07-14-at-3.51.56%E2%80%AFPM.png)

## Advanced Settings

The Advanced Settings section allows you to control the individual testimonial setting as well as the overall block “wrapper” settings.

**Padding:** Controls the padding inside individual testimonials

**Container Max Width (px):** Set a maximum width for testimonials.

**Container Min height:** Set a minimum height for testimonials.

**Wrapper:** Set the overall block padding and margins.

![Testimonial Block - Advanced Settings](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/Screenshot-2025-07-14-at-4.13.04%E2%80%AFPM-495x1024.png)

## Individual Testimonial Settings

You can customize the settings for each individual testimonial by clicking on it. Here you can set the type of media (Image or Icon) and adjust the Rating.

![](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2023/02/individual_testimonial.jpg)

web.title: Accordion Block - Kadence WP Documentation
web.description: The Accordion Block allows you to add custom content to an accordion-style layout. Add whatever block content you like within the Accordion Block and.
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/accordion-block/#main) Select the Knowledge BaseAll ProductsKadence AIKadence BlocksKadence ConversionsKadence Creative KitKadence GeneralKadence GuidesKadence InsightsKadence Pattern HubKadence Shop KitKadence Theme The Accordion Block allows you to add custom content to an accordion-style layout. Add whatever block content you like within the Accordion Block and customize the appearance to meet your needs! ## Sample Accordion Click me for an example! By default, this panel is concealed and appears when the user clicks on the section title. Input relevant information about its title using paragraphs or bullet points. Accordions can enhance the user experience when utilized effectively. They allow users to choose what they want to read and disregard the rest. Accordions are often utilized for frequently asked questions (FAQs). Click me for an example! By default, this panel is concealed and appears when the user clicks on the section title. Input relevant information about its title using paragraphs or bullet points. Accordions can enhance the user experience when utilized effectively. They allow users to choose what they want to read and disregard the rest. Accordions are often utilized for frequently asked questions (FAQs). Click me for an example! By default, this panel is concealed and appears when the user clicks on the section title. Input relevant information about its title using paragraphs or bullet points. Accordions can enhance the user experience when utilized effectively. They allow users to choose what they want to read and disregard the rest. Accordions are often utilized for frequently asked questions (FAQs). ## Adding an Accordion Block You can add an Accordion Block by adding a new block to the page and locating the Accordion Block under the Kadence Blocks category. ![](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/AccordionBlock.jpg) Whenever you add a new Accordion Block to a page, you will be prompted to select an initial style. ![Initial Accordion Styles](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/Initial-Styles.jpg) You will see a Parent Accordion Block along with Nested Pane Blocks. The Accordion Block controls the Accordion as a whole, while each Pane Block has its own Block Settings. ![Accordion_and_panes](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/Accordion_and_panes-scaled.jpg) You can customize your Accordion Block and Panes using the Block Settings in your Editor. ![Accordion Block Settings](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/AccordionBlockSettings-scaled.jpg) Select the parent Accordion Block and use the Add Accordion Item button to add additional panes to the accordion block. ![Adding a new Accordion Pane](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/Adding-a-new-Accordion-Pane-scaled.jpg) Additionally, you can select individual panes to configure their block settings or remove them from the accordion. ![Accordion Panes](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/Accoredion-Panes.gif) ## General Settings You can enable the option to close panes whenever other panes are opened. You can also enable the option to start with all panes collapsed. The Initial Open Accordion option allows you to select which Accordion Pane is open by default. The Pane Trigger Icon settings allow you to enable and select Icons for opening and closing your Accordion Panes You can select an Icon Side (right or left) and set an Icon Color for the normal, hover, and active states. ![Accordion General Settings](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/AccordionGeneralSettings.jpg) ## Style Settings You can set the Pane Tile Color and Title Background for the normal, hover, and active states. ![pane title colors](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/panetilecolors.jpg) The Pane Title Border settings allow you to set a Border for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. You can set the Border for the normal, hover, and active states. You can also set the Border Radius for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. The Pane Title Font Settings allows you to set the Font Size for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. You can set the Font Family, Font Weight, and Letter Spacing for the Pane Title as well. ![Accordion Style Settings B](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/AccordionStyleB.jpg) For the Inner Content Styling, you can set the Text, Text Link, and Text Link Hover colors. You can set the background color. You can also apply a border and border radius for desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. ![Accordion Style Settings C](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/AccordionStyleC.jpg) ## Advanced Settings Under the Pane Title Sizing section, you can adjust the Padding for your Pane Title. The Pane Space Between setting controls the gap between your panes. You can set the Inner Content Padding. You can also set the Title Tag. By default, this is a div, but you can use a heading tag if you prefer. The Structure Settings allow you to set a Content Minimum Height and a Max Width. ![Accordion Advanced Settings A](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/AccordionAdvancedA.jpg) ### Enabling FAQ Schema FAQ schema is a type of structured data that helps search engines understand your Accordion Block’s content is in a question and answer format. By enabling this, you can improve the visibility of your FAQ pages in search results and potentially get your answers displayed as rich snippets. ### Saving Block Defaults Block Defaults allows you to save your block settings as defaults when adding new blocks. You can learn more about [Block Defaults here](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/documentation/getting-started/setting-block-defaults/)! ### Advanced Here you can set an HTML anchor for the entire block and also add Additional CSS class(es) to your block. ![Accordion Advanced Settings - FAQ Schema](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/AccordionAdvancedB.jpg) ## Pane Block Settings Each Pane within the Accordion Block can be configured individually. ![Accordion Block - Panes](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/Screenshot-2025-05-01-at-3.05.09%E2%80%AFPM.png) After selecting a Pane, you will be able to adjust the individual Pane settings. You can add a Pane Title Icon and control which side it appears on. This will override the Accordion Block icon setting for this individual Pane. You can also enable the option to Show Only the Icon. Setting the Button Label Attribute is useful for accessibility, especially if you enable the Icon Only option. ### Linking to a Pane Adding an HTML Anchor to your Pane allows you to link directly to a tab by adding the HTML Anchor to the URL (i.e. yoursite.com/yourpage/#tab-a). Be sure that each HTML Anchor is unique as you cannot have duplicates on a page. You can also add Additional CSS Class(es) to your Pane Block for your custom CSS styles. ![Pane Block Settings](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2019/05/PaneBlockSettings.jpg) ## Adjusting Allowed HTML Tags in FAQ Schema You may need to add or remove HTML tags from your FAQ Schema. While this is generally not necessary, as Kadence already filters out most tags. The following PHP code snippets will allow you to add or remove allowed HTML tags. ### Adding HTML Allowed Tags to the FAQ Schema The Kadence Accordion block with FAQ schema supports a limited set of HTML tags within FAQ answers to enable basic text formatting. Google recognizes the following tags:

through

,
,
    ,
      ,
    • , ,

      ,

      , , , , and . All other tags are ignored. _[Google’s structured data guidelines](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/faqpage#answer)_ permit these tags in the Answers as they improve readability and user experience without altering the content’s meaning. Including basic formatting helps make FAQ answers clearer and easier to scan. The Kadence block allows the following tags by default: , ,
      ,

      ,

      ,

      ,

      ,
        ,
      • ,
          , and

          . Should you want to add any HTML tags to the schema, you will need to _**[add a PHP code snippet](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-theme/how-to-add-a-custom-filter-or-function-with-code-snippets/)**_ like this: ```php add_filter( 'kadence_blocks_faq_schema_allowed_tags', 'custom_faq_schema_allowed_tags', 10, 1 ); function custom_faq_schema_allowed_tags( $tags ) { // Add allowed tags (example: and ) $tags .= ''; // Return the updated list of allowed tags return $tags; } ``` ### Removing HTML Tags from the FAQ Schema If you’d like to remove one or more HTML tags from the FAQ schema, you can _**[add a PHP code snippet](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-theme/how-to-add-a-custom-filter-or-function-with-code-snippets/)**_ like this: ```php add_filter( 'kadence_blocks_faq_schema_allowed_tags', 'custom_faq_schema_remove_tags', 10, 1 ); function custom_faq_schema_remove_tags( $tags ){ // List the tags you want to remove $remove_tags = ['p', 'br']; // Build regex patterns $patterns = array_map(function($remove) { return '/<' . $remove . '\s*\/?>/i'; }, $remove_tags); $tags = preg_replace($patterns, '', $tags); return $tags; } ``` ### Removing All HTML Tags from the FAQ Schema Here is a PHP code snippet that will remove **all** HTML tags from the FAQ schema: ```php add_filter( 'kadence_blocks_faq_schema_allowed_tags', 'custom_faq_schema_disallow_all_tags', 10, 1 ); function custom_faq_schema_disallow_all_tags( $tags ) { // Return an empty string to disallow all HTML tags return ''; } ``` ##### Do you feel this document was helpful? web.title: Kadence Blocks Pro Plugin
web.description: Kadence Blocks Pro is a premium plugin that extends the functionality of the free Kadence Blocks plugin. Blocks Pro adds additional Pro Kadence Blocks.
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/kadence-blocks-pro-plugin/#main)

Select the Knowledge BaseAll ProductsKadence AIKadence BlocksKadence ConversionsKadence Creative KitKadence GeneralKadence GuidesKadence InsightsKadence Pattern HubKadence Shop KitKadence Theme

Kadence Blocks Pro is a premium plugin that extends the functionality of the free Kadence Blocks plugin. Blocks Pro adds additional Pro Kadence Blocks that can be used in the Block Editor while also unlocking powerful Pro Features, such as Dynamic Content and Conditional Display.

To use **Kadence Blocks Pro** on your website, the **free Kadence Blocks** plugin must also be **installed** and **activated**, as _Kadence Blocks Pro_ is an _extension_ of the **free** **plugin**, not a replacement.

The Kadence Blocks Pro plugin is available in both the [Kadence Plus and Kadence Ultimate Plans](https://www.kadencewp.com/pricing/). You can also purchase the Kadence Blocks Pro plugin [individually](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/pro/). Not sure if you want Kadence Blocks Pro? [Click here](https://www.kadencewp.com/kadence-blocks/try/) to try a live demo of Kadence Blocks Pro.

This video is hidden as it needs to be updated

## Installing Kadence Blocks Pro

Installing the Kadence Blocks Pro plugin is easy. Just follow the steps below to get started.

Once you have access to the Kadence Blocks Pro Plugin, you can download it from your KadenceWP [Downloads & License](https://www.kadencewp.com/my-account/downloads/) page.

![Downloads and licenses](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2021/05/Downloads-and-licenses-1024x601.jpg)

You will see Kadence Blocks Pro listed in your Products list. You can click on the Download button to download the Kadence Blocks Pro Zip. Be sure to leave the file compressed and don’t unzip it.

![Download Kadence blocks pro](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2022/07/Download-Kadence-blocks-Pro-1.jpg)

Next, navigate to your WordPress Dashboard and go to Plugins -> Add New Plugin. At the top of the Add New Plugin page, click on the **Upload** **Plugin** button.

![Upload Kadence Blocks Pro](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2022/07/Upload-Kadence-Blocks-Pro-scaled.jpg)

Then, click on the **Choose** **File** button and select your Kadence Blocks Pro zip file. Once you have selected the file, click the **Install** **Now** button.

![Install Blocks Pro](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2022/07/Install-Blocks-Pro.jpg)

Once the plugin is installed, click the blue **Activate** **Plugin** button to activate your plugin.

![Activate Kadence Blocks Pro](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/wp-content/uploads/sites/14/2022/07/Activate-Blocks-Pro-1024x491.jpg)

Now your Kadence Blocks Pro plugin is Activated on your website.

## Licensing Kadence Blocks Pro

With our new licensing system, there’s **no need to manually enter a license key**. Simply upload and install the latest plugin ZIP file to your site, and the license will be applied automatically.

## Kadence Block Pro Features

Once you have the Kadence Blocks Pro plugin activated, you have unlocked all of the features of Kadence Blocks Pro. These features include:

- **[Animate on Scroll](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/how-to-add-animate-on-scroll-effects-to-your-page/)** – Create a beautiful experience for your visitors with on-scroll animation to reveal your content in an engaging way. ( _This feature is also available in [Kadence Creative Kit](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-general/kadence-creative-kit/))_
- **[Custom Icons](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/custom-icons/)** – Never be without the perfect icon, with custom icons you can upload your own custom icon or an entire set.
- **[Dynamic Content](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/dynamic-content/)** – Dynamically pull in custom fields into your blocks for powerful site control. Really useful for Kadence Elements Templating.
- **[Conditional Display](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/conditional-display/)** – Display Row Layout Blocks or Sections based on conditions that you can set in the Block Settings.
- **[Custom Fonts](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/kadence-custom-fonts/)** – Create the perfect design with the perfect font. Easily upload a custom font or use Adobe Fonts.
- **[Premium Design Library](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/how-to-control-the-kadence-design-library/)** – Speed up your development with access to all of the premium design library items and starter sites.
- **[Page Specific Scripts](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/the-kadence-block-controls/#page-scripts-blocks-pro)** – Need to add custom tracking script to a single page or post? Now you can right in the editor tools.
- **[Query Loop (Adv) Block](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/advanced-query-loop-block/)** – Add advanced query loops across your website with advanced customization features.
- **[Repeater Block](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/repeater/)** – Display repeater custom fields dynamically using the Kadence Repeater Block.
- **[Image Overlay Block](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/image-overlay-block/)** – Create an image link with an overlay title and subtitle.
- **[Video Popup Block](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/video-popup-block/)** – Display a thumbnail with overlay and hover effects that link to a video popup on click. Works with both local and external videos.
- **[Modal Block](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/modal-block/)** – Easily create a call to action button that opens a modal box with any content. Customize overlay, animation, size and placement.
- **[Post Grid/Carousel](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/kadence-blocks-post-grid-carousel-block/)** – Add a grid or carousel of posts, pages, or custom post types and customize to your desired layout. Select by individual posts or taxonomy.
- **[Portfolio Grid/Carousel](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/portfolio-grid-carousel-block/)** – Add a grid or carousel of posts, pages, or custom posts types with an image heavy design. Select by individual posts or taxonomy.
- **[Product Carousel](https://www.kadencewp.com/help-center/docs/kadence-blocks/product-carousel-block/)** – Add a WooCommerce product carousel to your page or post, select products by category, on sale, best selling, or individually.
